mermaidSyntax:
graph TD
  subgraph Genomics[🧬 Genomics Stream]
    G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling]
    G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation]
  end

  subgraph Transcriptomics[🧪 Transcriptomics Stream]
    T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression]
    T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment]
  end

  subgraph Proteomics[🔬 Proteomics Stream]
    P1[Mass Spec] --> P2[Protein Quantification]
    P2 --> P3[Post-translational Modifications]
  end

  G3 --> HUB[Integration Hub]
  T3 --> HUB
  P3 --> HUB

  G3 -.->|Variants inform DE| T2
  P3 -.->|PTMs validate findings| T3

  subgraph HubOps[⚙️ Integration Hub]
    HUB --> MOFA[Multi-omics Factor Analysis MOFA]
    HUB --> NET[Network Analysis]
    HUB --> CAU[Causal Inference]
  end

  MOFA --> BD[Biomarker Discovery]
  NET --> MI[Mechanism Insight]
  CAU --> PB[Publication]

  subgraph BioDisc[Biomarker Discovery]
    BD --> BD1[Candidate Selection]
    BD1 --> BD2[Validation Cohort]
    BD2 --> BD3[Clinical Utility]
  end

  subgraph MechIns[Mechanism Insight]
    MI --> MI1[Pathway Modeling]
    MI1 --> MI2[Drug Target ID]
  end

  subgraph PubPipe[Publication]
    PB --> PB1[Manuscript]
    PB1 --> PB2[Peer Review]
    PB2 --> PB3[Journal]
  end

  BD3 -.->|Targeted Validation| G1
  BD3 -.->|Targeted Validation| T1
  BD3 -.->|Targeted Validation| P1

  classDef genomics fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1e40af,color:#fff
  classDef transcriptomics fill:#10b981,stroke:#047857,color:#fff
  classDef proteomics fill:#8b5cf6,stroke:#6d28d9,color:#fff
  classDef hub fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
  classDef output fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff

  class G1,G2,G3 genomics
  class T1,T2,T3 transcriptomics
  class P1,P2,P3 proteomics
  class HUB,MOFA,NET,CAU hub
  class BD,BD1,BD2,BD3,MI,MI1,MI2,PB,PB1,PB2,PB3 output
